expectations.text: Reads or references all three core CSVs (scenes.csv, scene-briefs.csv, scene-intent.csv)
expectations.evidence: References all three CSVs plus all registry CSVs, voice guide, prose files, and evaluation findings

expectations.text: Checks or mentions multiple hone domains (at least 2 of: registries, gaps, briefs, structural)
expectations.evidence: Covers gaps (missing briefs, empty new-x1), registries (unregistered locations/characters), structural (chapter map, status inconsistency), physical state issues

expectations.text: Identifies new-x1 (or scenes with empty fields) as having data gaps
expectations.evidence: Identifies new-x1's empty brief, act2-sc01/act2-sc02 missing briefs, unregistered locations, and more

expectations.text: Presents findings in a prioritized or structured way
expectations.evidence: Structured numbered summary with 7 key issues, followed by prioritized recommendation

expectations.text: Recommends which domain to tackle first based on the project state
expectations.evidence: Recommends storyforge-hone for registries/structural first, then elaboration for missing briefs
